name: Rice Salad with Wasabi Dressing
recipeInstructions:
For the dressing, mix 2 teaspoons wasabi powder with 1 tablespoon warm water and let stand for 10 minutes. Combine all dressing ingredients in a bowl and whisk until smooth.
For the salad, thinly slice 3 green onions on the diagonal. Core, seed, and dice 1 sweet red bell pepper. Cut 1 cucumber into half-length slices, remove seeds, and cut crosswise into crescent-shaped pieces. Add the vegetables and 2 cups cooked white or brown rice to the dressing and toss well.
